ja_transcribed: [息子|むす|こ]は、[目|め]が[見|み]えないんです。
en: My son is blind.

ja_transcribed: [冷蔵庫|れい|ぞう|こ]は[食|た]べ[物|もの]でパンパンだ。
en: The fridge is bursting with food.
The fridge is full of food.
The refrigerator is full of food.

ja_transcribed: [開発|かい|はつ]の[継続|けい|ぞく]に[寄付|き|ふ]は[大切|たい|せつ]です。
en: Donations are important for development to continue.

ja_transcribed: 「[新聞|しん|ぶん]は？」「[冷蔵庫|れい|ぞう|こ]の[上|うえ]よ」
en: "Where's the newspaper?" "On top of the fridge."

ja_transcribed: [冷蔵庫|れい|ぞう|こ]には[何|なに]も[残|のこ]っていない。
en: There's nothing left in the fridge.
There's nothing left in the refrigerator.

ja_transcribed: [冷蔵庫|れい|ぞう|こ]には[牛乳|ぎゅう|にゅう]しかないんだ。
en: There's only milk in the fridge.
There's nothing but milk in the fridge.
There's nothing in the fridge except milk.
There's nothing in the refrigerator except milk.
